CHAR_1.name: Ông Chính
CHAR_1.voice_personality: Deep, authoritative yet trembling with underlying worry
CHAR_1.face_shape: Square jawline with high cheekbones and a furrowed brow
CHAR_1.hair: Black, neatly combed back with a slight sheen. 3D rendered surface with smooth shading, PBR materials
CHAR_1.skin_or_fur_color: Tanned complexion, weathered by river sun. 3D rendered surface with smooth shading, PBR materials
CHAR_1.signature_feature: Always holding a string of prayer beads (tràng hạt) in his hand, fingers constantly moving
CHAR_1.outfit_top: High-quality traditional black silk tunic with subtle embroidered patterns. PBR materials with realistic silk sheen
CHAR_1.body_metrics: Stiff posture reflecting high social status and internal tension

CHAR_2.name: Bà Chính
CHAR_2.body_build: Slender, fragile posture, appearing physically weakened by sorrow
CHAR_2.face_shape: Thin, oval face with high forehead and sunken cheeks
CHAR_2.hair: Long black hair, tied in a low, neat bun. 3D rendered surface with smooth shading
CHAR_2.skin_or_fur_color: Pale, wan complexion. 3D rendered surface with smooth shading, PBR materials
CHAR_2.signature_feature: Deep, sorrowful expression with red-rimmed eyes from crying; always clutching a white handkerchief
CHAR_2.outfit_top: Elegant but muted grey silk traditional tunic with simple silver embroidery
CHAR_2.helmet_or_hat: Silver hairpin with a small lotus motif
CHAR_2.body_metrics: Slightly hunched shoulders, slow and deliberate movements

CHAR_3.name: Bà Nhỏ
CHAR_3.voice_personality: Clear, high-pitched, often laced with sarcasm
CHAR_3.body_build: Petite and youthful, graceful and light on her feet
CHAR_3.face_shape: Heart-shaped face with a sharp chin and full lips
CHAR_3.hair: Long, flowing black hair, often decorated with fresh jasmine flowers
CHAR_3.skin_or_fur_color: Fair skin, glowing and healthy. 3D rendered surface with smooth shading, PBR materials
CHAR_3.signature_feature: A slightly mocking, confident smile; sharp, ambitious eyes
CHAR_3.outfit_top: Vibrant pink silk bà ba outfit with a form-fitting cut
CHAR_3.helmet_or_hat: Small white jasmine flowers tucked behind her ear
CHAR_3.body_metrics: Fluid, confident movements, often swaying slightly

CHAR_4.name: Bà Cố
CHAR_4.voice_personality: Raspy, low, sounding like cracking dry wood
CHAR_4.body_build: Thin, wiry frame with surprisingly strong, steady hands
CHAR_4.face_shape: Sharp, angular face with deep lines of hardship and intensity
CHAR_4.hair: Long and wild, gray-streaked black hair. Often hidden under a brown turban
CHAR_4.skin_or_fur_color: Dark, sun-weathered, and leathery skin. 3D rendered surface with smooth shading, PBR materials
CHAR_4.signature_feature: Piercing, intense eyes that seem to see through objects; facial scars partially hidden by the shadow of her turban
CHAR_4.outfit_top: Rough-spun brown male carpenter’s tunic, worn and stained with wood dust
CHAR_4.outfit_bottom: Matching rough-spun brown trousers tied at the waist
CHAR_4.helmet_or_hat: A simple dark brown fabric turban (khăn đóng) wrapped tightly
CHAR_4.props: Small woodworking knife tucked into a belt (fixed accessory)
CHAR_4.body_metrics: Low center of gravity, moves with a silent, predatory grace

CHAR_5.name: Ông Nội
CHAR_5.body_build: Aged and slightly hunched, frail but serene
CHAR_5.face_shape: Deeply wrinkled, kind face with a wispy white beard
CHAR_5.hair: Thin, long white hair and a sparse white goatee
CHAR_5.skin_or_fur_color: Wrinkled, pale, paper-thin skin. 3D rendered surface with smooth shading, PBR materials
CHAR_5.signature_feature: Clouded, milky white blind eyes that seem to gaze into another world
CHAR_5.outfit_top: Simple, clean white cotton bà ba shirt
CHAR_5.body_metrics: Fragile, slow-motion movements, often sitting perfectly still

CHAR_6.name: Kỳ
CHAR_6.body_build: Fit, modern build with an athletic posture
CHAR_6.face_shape: Square jaw, friendly features, and bright, curious eyes
CHAR_6.hair: Short, modern black hair, styled naturally
CHAR_6.skin_or_fur_color: Healthy tan, smooth modern skin. 3D rendered surface with smooth shading, PBR materials
CHAR_6.signature_feature: Always carrying either a modern smartphone or a weathered, old yellowed diary
CHAR_6.outfit_top: Clean white cotton T-shirt. Fabric shows natural weave and slight wrinkles
CHAR_6.outfit_bottom: Dark blue denim jeans with natural fade patterns
CHAR_6.props: None in base character lock (diary/phone used per scene)
CHAR_6.body_metrics: Energetic, purposeful walk and expressive hand gestures

BACKGROUND_1.key_objects: Massive colonial-style mansion, red roof tiles, polished black wooden pillars, Mekong River with floating water lilies, rice boats, bustling dock
BACKGROUND_1.spatial_layout: Expansive outdoor estate overlooking a wide, brown river; mansion dominates the background
BACKGROUND_1.atmosphere: Opulent yet eerie, with long shadows cast by the sunset
BACKGROUND_1.visual_style: Vintage Retro Cinematic 3D with high-detail wood textures and water reflections
BACKGROUND_1.lighting: Golden hour sunset, high contrast with long, dramatic shadows

BACKGROUND_2.key_objects: Dark wood altar, five small memorial tablets, incense burners, flickering candles, rhythmic wooden bell (mõ), The Cursed Chess Set (Bộ cờ tướng gỗ sưa đỏ)
BACKGROUND_2.spatial_layout: Cramped, dim interior room with the altar as the central focus
BACKGROUND_2.atmosphere: Mournful, heavy with incense smoke, spiritually charged
BACKGROUND_2.visual_style: 3D CGI rendering with octane-style lighting and volumetric smoke
BACKGROUND_2.lighting: Flickering orange candlelight against deep dark ebony furniture shadows

BACKGROUND_3.key_objects: Tall, thick green and yellow reeds, a small dilapidated thatched hut, a narrow wooden sampan (xuồng), woodworking tools, The Cursed Chess Set (Bộ cờ tướng gỗ sưa đỏ)
BACKGROUND_3.spatial_layout: Isolation within a dense marshland; a small clearing for the hut near the water's edge
BACKGROUND_3.visual_style: Naturalistic 3D with realistic foliage and murky, silt-heavy river water
BACKGROUND_3.lighting: Dappled moonlight or harsh, direct midday sun depending on time

BACKGROUND_4.key_objects: Polished wooden platform (phản), modern furniture, dusty wooden chest, old handwritten diary, framed family photos
BACKGROUND_4.spatial_layout: Comfortable, airy living room with a mix of traditional and modern Vietnamese elements
BACKGROUND_4.visual_style: Clean, high-detail 3D animation with soft, naturalistic lighting
BACKGROUND_4.lighting: Soft morning sunlight through open windows

visual_style: High-quality 3D CGI animation with a cinematic, vintage retro aesthetic. The style utilizes Physically Based Rendering (PBR) for materials like dark polished ebony wood, luxurious silk fabrics, and murky Mekong river water. For the 1920s segments, a sepia-toned, high-contrast palette is used to evoke a haunting, spiritual atmosphere with dramatic shadows. The modern segments feature a clean, bright, and naturalistic look with vibrant but soft lighting. Style reference: Pixar-level character detail combined with Studio Ghibli's environmental mood, applied to a realistic 3D cinematic context. Volumetric lighting and atmospheric smoke effects are used throughout to enhance the spiritual themes.
